# InstallAptPackage

Install packages on Debian-family nodes with apt.

## Summary

- kind: `InstallAptPackage`
- phase: `apply`
- group: Packages and Repositories

## When To Use

Use this during apply when the workflow targets Debian or Ubuntu hosts and needs apt-specific install behavior.

## Example

```yaml
kind: InstallAptPackage
spec:
  packages: [kubelet, kubeadm, kubectl]
  restrictToRepos:
    - /etc/apt/sources.list.d/offline.list
  apt:
    installRecommends: false
```

## Spec Fields

| Key | Type | Required | Default | Enum | Description | Example |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `spec.apt` | `object` | no | `` | `` | Apt-specific installation options. | `{installRecommends:false,fixBroken:true}` |
| `spec.excludeRepos` | `array<string>` | no | `` | `` | Apt source list files to exclude from package resolution. | `[/etc/apt/sources.list.d/updates.list]` |
| `spec.packages` | `array<string>` | yes | `` | `` | Package names to install. | `[kubelet,kubeadm,kubectl]` |
| `spec.restrictToRepos` | `array<string>` | no | `` | `` | Limit apt visibility to these source list files. | `[/etc/apt/sources.list.d/offline.list]` |
| `spec.source` | `object` | no | `` | `` | Local repository source used for the installation. | `{type:local-repo,path:/opt/deck/repos/kubernetes}` |

## Nested Objects

### `spec.apt`

| Key | Type | Required | Default | Enum | Description | Example |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `spec.apt.allowDowngrade` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Allow installing a lower package version than the installed version. | `true` |
| `spec.apt.defaultRelease` | `string` | no | `` | `` | Default apt release used for package selection. | `jammy` |
| `spec.apt.dpkgOptions` | `array<string>` | no | `` | `` | Additional dpkg force options passed through apt-get. | `[force-confdef,force-confold]` |
| `spec.apt.failOnAutoremove` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Fail if apt would remove packages as part of dependency resolution. | `true` |
| `spec.apt.fixBroken` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Attempt to correct broken dependencies during apt installation. | `true` |
| `spec.apt.installRecommends` | `boolean` | no | `` | `` | Install recommended packages. Omit to use the operating system default. | `false` |

### `spec.source`

| Key | Type | Required | Default | Enum | Description | Example |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `spec.source.path` | `string` | yes | `` | `` | Filesystem path to the pre-prepared local package repository. | `/opt/deck/repos/kubernetes` |
| `spec.source.type` | `string` | yes | `` | `` | Source type. Currently only `local-repo` is supported. | `local-repo` |


## Notes

- Use `InstallAptPackage` when the workflow intentionally targets Debian-family hosts.
- Use `InstallPackage` with `manager: auto` for portable workflows.
